challenge.title: Korak 6
challenge.description: Ako godišnji prihod i kreditni rejting kandidata padnu ispod minIncomeForCar i minCreditScoreForCar, onda se ne kvalifikuju za bilo koji kredit. Stoga, vrati string "You don't qualify for any loans."

challengeFiles.name: script

tests.text: Your getLoanMessage function should return a string if the applicant doesn't qualify for any loan.
Your getLoanMessage function should return the string "You don't qualify for any loans." if the applicant does not meet the requirements for any loan.

challengeFiles.name: script
